case_title: LAW OFFICES OF JAMES M. ROGERS VS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPT OF PUBLIC WORK et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LAW OFFICES OF JAMES M. ROGERS AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPT OF PUBLIC WORK -S MATTHEW DAVIS, OFFICE OF CITY ATTORNEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-26-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAW OFFICES OF JAMES M. ROGERS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPT OF PUBLIC WORK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
